server_power.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict AC power consumption from fields including CPU utilization, disk utilization, and unhalted core cycles.
server_power.name: Server Power
server_power.title: Predict Server Power Consumption

app_usage.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict remote access to the VPN from four other fields.
app_usage.name: App Usage
app_usage.title: Predict VPN Usage

housing.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict median house value from fields including crime rate, land zone, average rooms per dwelling, and property tax rate.
housing.name: Housing
housing.title: Predict Median House Value

energy_output.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict energy output values from the values for humidity, pressure, temperature, and vacuum.
energy_output.name: Power Plant
energy_output.title: Predict Power Plant Energy Output

future_logins.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict future logins from three other fields.
future_logins.name: Future Logins
future_logins.title: Predict Future Logins

future_vpn_sinusoidal.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict remote access via the VPN from thirteen other fields. In this example time is sinusoidal.
future_vpn_sinusoidal.name: Future VPN Sinusoidal
future_vpn_sinusoidal.title: Predict Future VPN Usage (sinusoidal time)

future_vpn_categorical.description: This example uses the Predict Numeric Fields Assistant and the Linear Regression algorithm to predict remote access via the VPN from twelve other fields. In this example time is categorical.
future_vpn_categorical.name: Future VPN Categorical
future_vpn_categorical.title: Predict Future VPN Usage (categorical time)

disk_failures.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the Logistic Regression algorithm to predict disk failure from fields including hard drive model.
disk_failures.name: Disk Failures
disk_failures.title: Predict Hard Drive Failure

malware.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the Logistic Regression algorithm to predict malware from fields including bytes received, bytes sent, and destination port.
malware.name: Malware
malware.title: Predict the Presence of Malware

churn.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the Logistic Regression algorithm to predict customer churn from fields including daytime minutes, nighttime minutes, and voicemail plan.
churn.name: Churn
churn.title: Predict Telecom Customer Churn

diabetes.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the Logistic Regression algorithm to predict the response of diabetes from six other fields including BMI, age, blood pressure, and glucose concentration.
diabetes.name: Diabetes
diabetes.title: Predict the Presence of Diabetes

vehicle_type.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the LogisticRegression algorithm to predict vehicle type from seven other fields including battery voltage, engine coolant temperature, and speed.
vehicle_type.name: Race Cars
vehicle_type.title: Predict Vehicle Make and Model

external_anomalies.description: This example uses the Predict Categorical Fields Assistant and the Random Forest Classifier algorithm to predict business process anomalies from fields related to computer logs.
external_anomalies.name: External Anomalies
external_anomalies.title: Predict External Anomalies

server_response_time.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Median Absolute Deviation to look for outliers in server response time.
server_response_time.name: Server Response Time
server_response_time.title: Detect Outliers in Server Response Time

numeric_employee_logins.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Median Absolute Deviation to look for outliers in login information.
numeric_employee_logins.name: Employee Logins (prediction errors)
numeric_employee_logins.title: Detect Outliers in Number of Logins (vs. Predicted Value)

numeric_supermarket_purchases.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Standard Deviation to look for outliers in supermarket purchases data.
numeric_supermarket_purchases.name: Supermarket Purchases
numeric_supermarket_purchases.title: Detect Outliers in Supermarket Purchases

power_plant_humidity.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Standard Deviation to look for outliers in humidity related values.
power_plant_humidity.name: Power Plant Humidity
power_plant_humidity.title: Detect Outliers in Power Plant Humidity

call_center_cyclical.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Standard Deviation to look for outliers in call center data.
call_center_cyclical.name: Call Center Cyclical
call_center_cyclical.title: Detect Cyclical Outliers in Call Center Data

logins_cyclical.description: This example uses the Detect Numeric Outliers Assistant and threshold method of Standard Deviation to look for outliers in business process data and computer logs.
logins_cyclical.name: Logins Cyclical
logins_cyclical.title: Detect Cyclical Outliers in Logins

categorical_disk_failures.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on four fields of data that include model and serial number.
categorical_disk_failures.name: Disk Failures
categorical_disk_failures.title: Detect Outliers in Disk Failures

bitcoin_transactions.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on three fields of data that include user and value.
bitcoin_transactions.name: Bitcoin Transactions
bitcoin_transactions.title: Detect Outliers in Bitcoin Transactions

categorical_supermarket_purchases.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on six fields of data that include customer ID, product ID, and quantity.
categorical_supermarket_purchases.name: Supermarket Purchases
categorical_supermarket_purchases.title: Detect Outliers in Supermarket Purchases

mortage_loans_data_ny.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on eight fields including purchase price, contract interest rate, initial fees and changes, and term to maturity.
mortage_loans_data_ny.name: Mortgage Loans Data - New York
mortage_loans_data_ny.title: Detect Outliers in Mortgage Contracts

diabetic_data.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on seven fields including number of medications, number of procedures, and number of emergencies.
diabetic_data.name: Diabetic Data
diabetic_data.title: Detect Outliers in Diabetes Patient Records

phone_usage.description: This example uses the Detect Categorical Outliers Assistant on three fields of data that include incoming, outgoing, and missed call.
phone_usage.name: Phone Usage
phone_usage.title: Detect Outliers in Mobile Phone Activity

internet_traffic.description: This example uses the Forecast Time Series Assistant and the Kalman Filter algorithm to forecast future internet traffic.
internet_traffic.name: Internet Traffic
internet_traffic.title: Forecast Internet Traffic

forecast_employee_logins.description: This example uses the Forecast Time Series Assistant and the Kalman Filter algorithm to forecast future employee login numbers.
forecast_employee_logins.name: Employee Logins
forecast_employee_logins.title: Forecast the Number of Employee Logins

souvenir_sales.description: This example uses the Forecast Time Series Assistant and the Kalman Filter algorithm to forecast future souvenir sales numbers.
souvenir_sales.name: Souvenir Sales
souvenir_sales.title: Forecast Monthly Sales

bluetooth_devices.description: This example uses the Forecast Time Series Assistant and the Kalman Filter algorithm to forecast distinct addresses.
bluetooth_devices.name: Bluetooth Devices
bluetooth_devices.title: Forecast the Number of Bluetooth Devices

exchange_rate_ARIMA.description: This example uses the Forecast Time Series Assistant and the ARIMA algorithm to forecast the exchange rate.
exchange_rate_ARIMA.name: Exchange Rate ARIMA
exchange_rate_ARIMA.title: Forecast Exchange Rate TWI using ARIMA

hard_drives.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant, a preprocessing step using the PCA method, and the K-means algorithm to cluster on four different fields.
hard_drives.name: Disk
hard_drives.title: Cluster Hard Drives by SMART Metrics

apps.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant, a preprocessing step using the Standard Scaler method, and the Spectral Clustering algorithm to cluster on four different fields.
apps.name: Apps
apps.title: Cluster Behavior by App Usage

cluster_housing.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant, a preprocessing step using the PCA method, and the DBSCAN algorithm to cluster on three different fields.
cluster_housing.name: Housing
cluster_housing.title: Cluster Neighborhoods by Properties

vehicles.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant, a preprocessing step using the PCA method, and the Birch algorithm to cluster data on seven fields including battery voltage, engine speed, and vertical G-force.
vehicles.name: Track
vehicles.title: Cluster Vehicles by Onboard Metrics

powerplant.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant and the Birch algorithm to cluster data on five fields including humidity, pressure, and temperature.
powerplant.name: PowerPlant
powerplant.title: Cluster Power Plant Operating Regimes

business_anomalies.description: This example uses the Cluster Numeric Events Assistant, a preprocessing step using the PCA method, and the DBSCAN algorithm to cluster on a single field.
business_anomalies.name: Business Anomalies
business_anomalies.title: Cluster Business Anomalies to Reduce Noise

sf_app_usage.description: This example uses the Smart Forecasting Assistant to forecast expenses for the next month, based on three months of data. The Smart Forecasting Assistant leverages the StateSpaceForecast algorithm.
sf_app_usage.name: App Usage
sf_app_usage.title: Forecast App Expenses

sf_call_center.description: This example uses the Smart Forecasting Assistant to forecast call count for the next 30 points, based on three months of data. The Smart Forecasting Assistant leverages the StateSpaceForecast algorithm.
sf_call_center.name: Calls
sf_call_center.title: Forecast the Number of Calls to a Call Center

sf_app_logons.description: This example uses the Smart Forecasting Assistant to forecast the number of logons for the next 30 points, based on nine months of data. A lookup file excludes special days from the forecast. The Smart Forecasting Assistant leverages the StateSpaceForecast algorithm.
sf_app_logons.name: App Logons
sf_app_logons.title: Forecast App Logons with Special Days

sf_app_usage_multiple.description: This example uses the Smart Forecasting Assistant to forecast CRM and ERP for the next month, based on three months of data. The Smart Forecasting Assistant leverages the StateSpaceForecast algorithm.
sf_app_usage_multiple.name: App Expenses Multivariate
sf_app_usage_multiple.title: Forecast App Expenses from Multiple Variables

soda_disk_failure.description: This example uses the Smart Outlier Detection Assistant to find anomalies in SMART (self-monitoring, analysis, and reporting technology) metrics across different hard drive models. The Smart Outlier Detection Assistant leverages the DensityFunction algorithm.
soda_disk_failure.name: Hard Drive Anomalies
soda_disk_failure.title: Find Anomalies in Hard Drive Metrics

soda_supermarket.description: This example uses the Smart Outlier Detection Assistant to find anomalies in supermarket purchase quantity metrics across different shops. The Smart Outlier Detection Assistant leverages the DensityFunction algorithm.
soda_supermarket.name: Anomalies in Supermarket Purchases
soda_supermarket.title: Find Anomalies in Supermarket Purchases

property_descriptions.description: This example uses the Smart Clustering Assistant to group houses based on a selection of fields relating to those houses. The Smart Clustering Assistant leverages the K-Means algorithm.
property_descriptions.name: Property Descriptions
property_descriptions.title: Cluster Houses by Property Descriptions

mortgage_loans.description: This example uses the Smart Clustering Assistant to group mortgage loans based on a set of related fields. The Smart Clustering Assistant leverages the K-Means algorithm.
mortgage_loans.name: Mortgage Loans
mortgage_loans.title: Cluster Mortgage Loans

disk_utilization.description: This example uses the Smart Prediction Assistant and the AutoPrediction algorithm to predict disk utilization from fields in the data including disk access and disk blocks.
disk_utilization.name: Disk Utilization
disk_utilization.title: Predict Disk Utilization

firewall_traffic.description: This example uses the Smart Prediction Assistant and the AutoPrediction algorithm to predict vulnerabilities in firewall data from fields in the data including bytes received, bytes sent, packets received, and packets sent.
firewall_traffic.name: Firewall Traffic
firewall_traffic.title: Predict the Presence of Vulnerabilities

ai_assistant_example_I.description: This example uses the AI command to summarise internal Splunk error messages.
ai_assistant_example_I.name: search?q=index%3D_internal%20source%3D%22*mlspl.log*%22%20sourcetype%3Dmlspl%20ERROR%20earliest%3D-1h%20%7C%20table%20_time%20_raw%20%7C%20ai%20prompt%3D%22Please%20summarise%20these%20error%20messages%20and%20describe%20why%20I%20might%20receive%20them%3A%20%7B_raw%7D%22
ai_assistant_example_I.title: Summarization

ai_assistant_example_II.description: This example uses the AI command to generate regex for extracting fields from Splunk internal log messages.
ai_assistant_example_II.title: Field Extraction

ai_assistant_example_III.description: This example uses the AI command to detect anomalies in time series metrics, in this case counts of log events in the internal Splunk index.
ai_assistant_example_III.title: Anomaly Detection

cdtsm_example_I.description: This example uses CDTSM (Cisco Deep Time Series Model) to forecast CPU metrics using deep learning models.
cdtsm_example_I.title: Forecasting

cdtsm_example_II.description: This example uses CDTSM (Cisco Deep Time Series Model) to detect anomalies in time series data using the IQR method with threshold intervals.
cdtsm_example_II.title: Anomaly Detection
